instructors.name: Anna Lee
instructors.bio: Patient automatic-transmission specialist with a focus on helping anxious beginners build confidence in busy city traffic.

instructors.name: Miguel Ortiz
instructors.bio: Bilingual manual instructor with a high pass rate, specializing in parallel parking and tight maneuvering for city test routes.

instructors.name: Carla Dominguez
instructors.bio: Former test examiner who now coaches learners on what examiners look for during the road test.

instructors.name: James Wong
instructors.bio: Dual transmission instructor experienced with both beginner and advanced city driving, fluent in English and Mandarin.

instructors.name: Sophie Martin
instructors.bio: Automatic-only instructor focusing on step-by-step progress plans for nervous first-time drivers.

instructors.name: David Kim
instructors.bio: Manual-transmission specialist focused on clutch control and smooth gear changes for hilly routes.

instructors.name: Lucia Vega
instructors.bio: Friendly bilingual instructor offering both manual and automatic lessons, ideal for budget-conscious learners.

instructors.name: Omar Rahman
instructors.bio: Manual instructor with evening and weekend availability, experienced in preparing learners for mock driving tests.

instructors.name: Emma Johnson
instructors.bio: Calm automatic instructor specializing in after-work lessons and complex junction navigation.

instructors.name: Paul Nguyen
instructors.bio: Flexible instructor offering both manual and automatic lessons with a focus on highway and night driving.

instructors.name: Maria Santos
instructors.bio: Bilingual automatic instructor popular with beginners, offering structured lesson plans and home pickup in Midtown.

lesson_packages.name: Beginner 4-Lesson Automatic Starter Pack
lesson_packages.description: Four 60-minute automatic lessons focused on basic controls, junctions, and simple city routes with flexible weekday availability.

lesson_packages.name: Beginner 5-Lesson Automatic Home Pickup (10001)
lesson_packages.description: Five 60-minute automatic lessons with home pickup from ZIP 10001 and nearby areas, ideal for new learners starting from scratch.

lesson_packages.name: Beginner 5-Lesson Auto with Home Pickup - Midtown
lesson_packages.description: Structured five-lesson beginner course in an automatic car with home pickup across Midtown and nearby ZIP 10001.

lesson_packages.name: Advanced 2-Lesson Manual Test Refresher
lesson_packages.description: Two intensive 90-minute manual lessons focused on polishing maneuvers and test routes, including a full mock driving test.

lesson_packages.name: Intermediate 2-Lesson Automatic Tune-Up
lesson_packages.description: Two 60-minute automatic refresher lessons ideal for drivers returning to the road or preparing for a upcoming test.

lesson_packages.name: Beginner 2-Lesson Automatic Trial Pack
lesson_packages.description: A low-commitment trial of two 60-minute automatic lessons to get comfortable behind the wheel and assess your starting level.

lesson_packages.name: Beginner 10-Lesson Automatic Home Pickup Plan
lesson_packages.description: Ten 60-minute automatic lessons with home pickup, covering everything from basics to complex city driving and parking.

lesson_packages.name: Intermediate 8-Lesson Manual Skills Builder
lesson_packages.description: Eight 90-minute manual lessons focusing on clutch control, hill starts, and busy junctions for learners with some experience.

lesson_packages.name: Advanced 5-Lesson Manual Mock Test Package
lesson_packages.description: Five 90-minute manual lessons for advanced learners, including targeted mock tests on challenging city routes.

lesson_packages.name: 3-Lesson Test Prep with Mock Exam (Manual or Automatic)
lesson_packages.description: Three 90-minute lessons in manual or automatic, ending with a full mock driving test around common exam routes.

lesson_packages.name: Beginner 6-Lesson Manual Starter Course
lesson_packages.description: Six 60-minute manual lessons focused on foundations, gear changes, and low-speed maneuvering for new drivers.

lesson_packages.name: Evening Automatic Refresher - 3 Lessons
lesson_packages.description: Three 60-minute automatic lessons scheduled on weekday evenings to rebuild confidence in real traffic conditions.

lesson_packages.name: Advanced 10-Lesson Comprehensive Course (Manual & Automatic)
lesson_packages.description: Ten 90-minute lessons tailored to advanced skills, lane discipline, and highway driving, with options for manual or automatic.

lesson_packages.name: Legacy Beginner 5-Lesson Automatic Pack
lesson_packages.description: Archived beginner automatic package kept for reference on older bookings.
